audit_result.proof_trace: ELMemPoolRequirements is empty (verification/blob.go:77), so KZG proof verification (RequireSidecarKzgProofVerified) is skipped. GetBlobsV2 path (L714) bypasses verification entirely via NewVerifiedRODataColumn. Trust assumption contradicts semi-trusted property requirement.
audit_result.attack_scenario: Compromised EL sends blobs with invalid KZG proofs via GetBlobsV1/V2. CL accepts without cryptographic verification and propagates them as verified, corrupting network consensus with invalid blob data.

PROP-57888860-asm-003.text: Engine API blob data is semi-trusted; blobs from EL must still pass KZG commitment verification.
PROP-57888860-asm-003.assertion: forall blob from EL: verify_blob_kzg_proof(blob, commitment) == true before propagation
